usage.frequency: Every morning, reapply every 2 hours when exposed to sun
usage.instructions: Apply sunblock before going outdoors. Allow 15 minutes for skin to absorb the sunblock for maximum protection. Make sure to use enough sunblock. Rub the sunblock thoroughly into your skin. Make sure to apply on your neck, face, ears, top of your feet and legs.
usage.tips: For extended protection, reapply every two hours, or immediately after swimming or sweating.

warnings: Reapply after water exposure or sweating
